title: asplenium × pagesii nothosubsp. pagesii
intro: Asplenium × pagesii nothosubsp. pagesii, also known as the Pages' spleenwort, is a hybrid species of the Asplenium genus, a group of ferns commonly known as spleenworts. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its use as a hemostatic agent, which is a substance that helps to stop bleeding. The health benefits of Asplenium × pagesii nothosubsp. pagesii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, often in the form of infusions or tinctures, to support overall health and well-being.
